title: New Omdia research states that cellular IoT data traffic will reach 218.6 exabytes by 2035
content: The majority of cellular IoT data traffic will come from the automotive sector, with key use cases including infotainment services such as video and audio streaming, as well as firmware over-the-air updates. #pressrelease

title: T-Mobile's new JVs fixate on fiber
content: Marking a $2.7 billion investment that will aid a broader convergence strategy, T-Mobile has formed JVs with Oak Hill Capital and Wren House to acquire GoNetspeed, Greenlight Networks and i3 Broadband.

title: T-Mobile signs pair of strategic fiber JVs
content: T-Mobile has formed strategic fiber joint ventures with Oak Hill Capital and Wren House. #pressrelease

title: T-Mobile and Starlink pitch businesses on blended broadband
content: The 5G-plus-satellite 'SuperBroadband' bundle from T-Mobile and Starlink promises coverage in every US ZIP code. There's a 36-month commitment attached to that simplicity.

title: Iridium plays it cool amid heated satellite M&A
content: Iridium CEO talks up L-band value given recent M&A activity for spectrum but says focus is on organic growth and complementing bigger D2D players.

title: USTelecom wants feds to align on permitting reforms
content: In a letter to the heads of the Departments of Agriculture and the Interior, USTelecom CEO Jonathan Spalter urged the agencies to adopt recently issued White House guidance to streamline broadband permitting on federal land.
